name: AIM CUTTING TOOLS (ACT)
tagline: Precision Carbide Tooling. Manufactured to Perform.
description: AIM CUTTING TOOLS (ACT) is a premier manufacturer of Carbide Round Tools and trusted industrial trader based in Peenya 2nd Stage, Bangalore. Specializing in high-precision Solid Carbide Drills, Endmills, Reamers, Custom Form Tools, and professional resharpening & coating services.

contact.address: #4A, 12th Cross, Balaji Nagar, Thigalarapalya Main Road, Near Exam Center, Opp Road, Peenya 2nd Stage, Bangalore - 560058, Karnataka, India

rating.summaryText: Highly rated by leading precision engineering & machining workshops across India.

tradingItems: Measuring Instruments (Micrometers, Calipers, Height Gauges, Dial Indicators, Gauge Blocks)
Tooling Accessories (Collets, BT/CAT/ISO Tool Holder Shanks, Arbors, Wrenches)
Spares, Inserts, Taps, Jaws, U-Drills, VMC CNC Tooling Accessories

services.title: Precision Resharpening
services.subtitle: Restore Original Geometry & Extend Tool Life
services.description: High-precision CNC resharpening service for all carbide round tools. Restores razor-sharp cutting edges to original manufacturer specifications, cutting tooling replacement costs by up to 60%.

services.title: Tool Reconditioning
services.subtitle: Complete Geometric Reconstruction
services.description: Full end-to-end reconditioning of worn or damaged tools. Includes profile regrinding, relief angle correction, edge prepping, and neck reduction to restore optimal chip evacuation.

services.title: PVD / CVD Hard Coating
services.subtitle: Advanced Thermal & Wear Barrier Coatings
services.description: State-of-the-art PVD and CVD coatings (TiAlN, AlTiN, DLC, nACo) tailored to your target material (Steel, Stainless, Hardened Dies, Aluminum, Titanium) for maximum heat resistance and speed.
